calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Oct-17-2017 Discharged

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Sep-26-2017 Continued To Oct-17-17 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 514

MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Nov-14-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. DAVID D. JOHNSON OF CROWEL & MORING LLP, TEL. NO. 1-415-365-7262 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONERS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Petitioners Alameda Alliance for Health and Alameda Alliance Joint Powers Authority's Motion for Attorney's Fees and Costs - The motion is granted in substantial part. No opposition filed. Petitioners are awarded $9,625.00 as reasonable attorney's fees and $2,043.20 in costs. Petitioners' motion included 2 hours of anticipated attorney time to be incurred after the filing of the motion. Given that no opposition was filed, the court finds no additional attorney time was reasonably required. Thus, the court's award does not include the two hours of anticipated time. Order signed in open court. Judge; Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk; Cynthia Herbert; Reporter; Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/JQ
